devdoc.details: This helper is intended to close the empty/near-empty market window described in the      dLEND incident materials. It does not replace protocol-level fixes for the broader      dust-supply / liquidity-index inflation class.

enableReserves(address,address,(address,.details: The reserve must still be in the staged posture: collateral disabled, borrowing disabled,      stable borrowing disabled, and flash loans disabled.

params.inputParams: Final market parameters and seed-supply floors.

initAndStageReserves(address,address,(ad.details: The helper must hold both ASSET_LISTING_ADMIN_ROLE (or POOL_ADMIN_ROLE) and RISK_ADMIN_ROLE      on the PoolConfigurator before this function is executed.

params.inputParams: New reserve init params plus safe-stage parameters.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions anymore. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby removing any functionality that is only available to the owner.

stageReserves(address,address,(address,u.details: Intended for partially completed rollouts or recovery of interrupted listing flows.      The reserve must not already have supplier liquidity if collateral needs to be disabled.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

devdoc.title: AtomicMarketListingHelper

enableReserves(address,address,(address,.notice: Atomically enables staged reserves only after aToken supply exceeds an explicit floor.

initAndStageReserves(address,address,(ad.notice: Initializes new reserves and immediately stages them into a safe non-live posture.

stageReserves(address,address,(address,u.notice: Stages already-initialized reserves into a safe non-live posture.

userdoc.notice: Stages new reserves in a safe non-live configuration and atomically enables them only         after the reserve has been seeded above an explicit aToken supply floor.
